title: Doff Super Concentrate Path, Patio and Decking Cleaner – 2.5 Litres Concentrate – Multi-Surface Cleaner Garden & Driveways – Powerful Disinfectant & Algae Remover
features: POWERFUL OUTDOOR CLEANING – Effectively remove dirt, mould, algae and mildew with Doff Super Concentrate Path, Patio & Decking Cleaner. The patio cleaner’s advanced disinfectant and cleaning formula ensures a spotless and sanitised finish on various garden surfaces, including driveways and fencing

EASY & VERSATILE USAGE – Dilute 1-part cleaner concentrate with 4 parts water, apply using a garden sprayer or watering can, and walk away. The driveway and path cleaner is ideal for all outdoor living areas. This effective solution ensures a hassle-free application for various garden cleaning jobs

FAST-ACTING & RELIABLE – Powered by benzalkonium chloride, this disinfectant spray cleans exposed areas for weeks after application, ensuring outdoor spaces stay fresh and clean for longer. Perfect for hard garden surfaces and effective in all seasons when used as directed

COMPREHENSIVE OUTDOOR CARE – This 2.5l bottle produces up to 12l of cleaning solution, offering exceptional value for maintaining outdoor areas. Safe for wood, concrete, and other materials. It sanitises and rejuvenates surfaces with a low-pressure sprayer or watering can

OUTDOOR CLEANING EXPERTS – With decades of expert experience, Doff products deliver reliable, high-quality outdoor cleaning solutions. Proudly made in the UK, our advanced cleaning range ensures proven performance, helping to maintain a clean, fresh and inviting outdoor space
